performers.name: The River Road Ramblers
performers.description: Acoustic folk duo blending Appalachian roots with contemporary storytelling. Bring a blanket and settle in.

performers.name: Sonia Reyes Quartet
performers.description: Sonia's quartet brings the energy of salsa and bossa nova to the porch. Guaranteed to get you on your feet.

porches.neighborhood_note: Large yard, plenty of lawn space

performers.name: Maplewood Blues Project
performers.description: Local blues veterans with a repertoire stretching from Delta classics to Chicago electric. Don't miss their slide guitar.

performers.name: The Funky Hilton Horns
performers.description: An eight-piece funk ensemble born in the Hilton neighborhood. Soul, groove, and brass — all afternoon.

performers.name: Clara Westfield
performers.description: Pianist Clara Westfield performs solo repertoire from Chopin and Debussy. A quiet, beautiful corner of Porchfest.

performers.name: Hearthstone String Quartet
performers.description: Four friends, four strings, and a shaded porch. Expect Beethoven, Shostakovich, and a few surprises.

performers.name: Neon Gravity
performers.description: Guitar-driven indie rock with pop hooks and big energy. These kids grew up on Wilco and Vampire Weekend.

performers.name: The Hollow Pines
performers.description: Dreamy shoegaze-inflected indie rock. Closer vibes. Perfect for the golden hour.

performers.name: Tiny Tunes & Tales
performers.description: Interactive songs, stories, and silliness for the littlest Porchfest fans. All ages welcome, but bring the kids!

performers.name: Marcus & The Afternoon
performers.description: Marcus Chen's fingerpicking and warm baritone feel like a long summer afternoon. Originals and covers from his forthcoming album.

performers.name: The Idle Hours Jazz Band
performers.description: Traditional jazz standards and a few bebop charts from this beloved local ensemble. They've played every Porchfest.

performers.name: Vera Okafor Trio
performers.description: Contemporary jazz with West African harmonic influences. Vera's saxophone work is not to be missed.

porches.neighborhood_note: Top of the hill, great view

performers.name: Smoke & Ember
performers.description: Husband-and-wife blues duo. Slide guitar, harmonica, and soul-deep vocals. Raw and beautiful.

performers.name: DJ Mambo Groove
performers.description: A DJ set that mixes funk, soul, Afrobeat, and disco. The highest-energy porch on the block.

performers.name: The Porch Pickers
performers.description: Old-time string band featuring banjo, fiddle, upright bass, and mandolin. Expect dancing.

performers.name: Kids in Concert: Little Hilton Choir
performers.description: Local children's choir performing songs from their spring concert. Proud parents (and neighbors) encouraged to attend.

performers.name: Rosa & The Bloom
performers.description: Power trio closing out the afternoon with anthemic indie rock. A perfect send-off to a great Porchfest.
